name: Korg NTS-1 mk1
use: Synth sounds, FX processing, arpeggiator, loadable oscillators/FX via logue SDK
overview: DIY programmable synthesizer kit. Digital multi-engine oscillator (SAW/TRI/SQR/VPM/User OSC), analog-modelling multimode filter, ADSR/AHR/AR/Loop/Open EG, LFO (via MODE+OSC), 3-slot FX chain (MOD+DELAY+REVERB), and arpeggiator with 10 patterns. Custom oscillators and effects load via logue SDK. USB audio/MIDI + SYNC I/O.
workflow: Press <kbd>OSC</kbd> → TYPE knob selects engine (SAW/TRI/SQR/VPM/UserOSC) → <kbd>A</kbd> = Shape → <kbd>B</kbd> = alternate param
Press <kbd>FILTER</kbd> → TYPE selects LP2/LP4/BP2/BP4/HP2/HP4 → <kbd>A</kbd> = Cutoff → <kbd>B</kbd> = Resonance
Press <kbd>EG</kbd> → TYPE selects ADSR/AHR/AR/AR-Loop/Open → <kbd>A</kbd> = Attack → <kbd>B</kbd> = Release
Press <kbd>MOD</kbd>/<kbd>DELAY</kbd>/<kbd>REVERB</kbd> → TYPE selects FX type → <kbd>A</kbd> = Time → <kbd>B</kbd> = Depth
LFO: hold <kbd>OSC</kbd> + MODE button → <kbd>A</kbd> = LFO rate → <kbd>B</kbd> = LFO pitch/shape depth
Filter sweep: hold <kbd>FILTER</kbd> + MODE button → <kbd>A</kbd> = sweep rate → <kbd>B</kbd> = sweep depth (±direction)
Arpeggiator: press <kbd>ARP</kbd> once (runs while key held); long-press to latch; hold <kbd>ARP</kbd> + TYPE/A/B to configure
Hold <kbd>REVERB</kbd> on power-on → global settings; use TYPE+B to adjust; press ARP to save and restart

shortcuts.combo: SAW / TRI / SQR / VPM / UserOSC / OFF

shortcuts.action: Audio input mode: In Mode / In Level

shortcuts.combo: LP2 / LP4 / BP2 / BP4 / HP2 / HP4 / OFF

shortcuts.action: Release — time to reach zero after note end

shortcuts.combo: OFF / Stereo / Mono / Ping-Pong / High-Pass / Tape
OFF / Hall / Plate / Space / Riser / Submarine

shortcuts.action: Toggle arp — runs while ribbon key is held ★
Latch arp — keeps running without holding key ★
Tempo: 56–240 BPM (or step duration 16th–64th if synced) ★

shortcuts.combo: [TYPE] knob → select param, [B] knob → set value

tips: VPM engine: A = mod index (brightness/clang), B = ratio (harmonics) — quick FM-like timbres; start with B=1 then raise A
AR-Loop EG type: envelope retriggers itself continuously — functions as a low-rate tremolo/gate without using the LFO
Filter sweep direction: positive B values sweep up, negative sweep down — great for auto-filter risers and drops
Arpeggiator chord types (OSC/FILTER/MOD/DELAY/REVERB buttons while holding ARP) apply to every arp step — octave, sus4, aug, min, dim
Stochastic arp pattern: probabilistic step order — not fully random, weighted toward the original — great for generative feels
User OSC: load any logue SDK oscillator (community library at nutekt.org); it fully replaces the built-in engine slot
SYNC OUT jack sends a 5ms pulse at each step — chain to volca, NTS-3, or other SYNC gear for locked tempo
